living-concrete.knowledge: From Aristotle's "architectonic" - the master science that orders all others. This skill is the meta-cognitive equivalent: the skill that orchestrates skills.
living-concrete.pattern: 1. Extract intent (what is this REALLY for?) 2. Profile ideal creator (who makes the perfect version?) 3. Decompose disciplines (what do they know/think?) 4. Embody (temporarily become) 5. Regenerate (solve from elevation)
living-concrete.antipattern: Using current capabilities without asking if optimal. "I'll do my best" vs "What SHOULD I have?"
